title: Add "Guru & Associates is into" divisions subsection to About section

requirements.summary: Add a new "Guru & Associates is into" heading and a 3-card boxed grid under the existing About content, matching the existing feature-card styling and using the exact provided titles.
acceptanceCriteria: The About section shows a new subsection heading with the exact English text: "Guru & Associates is into".
Directly below that heading, there is a responsive 3-column (desktop) grid of three boxed cards.
Each card displays the exact titles: "GURU & ASSOCIATE WEALTH CREATOR", "G.P. ASSOCIATE LEGAL ADVISOR", and "GURU & ASSOCIATE PRODUCTION , DIRECTOR , FILM".
The three new boxes use the same visual card treatment as the existing feature cards (boxed layout with border/rounded corners/consistent spacing and hover behavior).

file_operations.description: Within the About section, insert a new subsection below the existing "About Guru & Associates" content: add an English heading with exact text "Guru & Associates is into" and render the three division items as a responsive 3-card grid. Reuse the same card container classes and hover/border/spacing treatment used by the existing feature cards (e.g., the "Expert Guidance" cards) so the new boxes are visually consistent, and ensure the card titles exactly match the required strings.
